news.title: Türkiye Dünya Kupası'na veda etti
news.summary: Türkiye A Milli Futbol Takımı, 2026 FIFA Dünya Kupası'nda D Grubu'ndaki ikinci maçında Paraguay'a 1-0 yenildi. Ay Yıldızlılar üst üste aldığı ikinci mağlubiyetin ardından son maçı öncesinde turnuvaya veda etti.

news.title: Daha uzun, daha hızlı, daha yaşlı: Elit futbolcuların vücutları 50 yılda nasıl değişti?
news.summary: Uzmanlar, daha yoğun maç temposu ve tıptaki gelişmelerin elit oyuncuların fizyolojisini dönüştürdüğünü söylüyor.

news.title: Cemil Tugay'ın istifası: Yeni parti hazırlığı sürüyor, belediye başkanlarına geçiş baskısı yok
news.summary: CHP'de mutlak butlan kararının ardından yeni parti tartışmaları sürerken, İzmir Büyükşehir Belediye Başkanı Cemil Tugay'ın istifası gözleri diğer CHP'li belediye başkanlarına çevirdi.

news.title: Türkiye'de çok sayıda LGBTQ+ örgütün X hesabı engellendi
news.summary: Türkiye'de insan hakları, kadın hakları ve LGBTQ+ haklarında faaliyet gösteren çok sayıda örgütün X (eski adıyla Twitter) hesapları erişime engellendi.

news.title: Yusuf Ziya Gümüşel'in tahliyesine kadar geçen süreçte neler yaşandı, bundan sonra ne olabilir?

news.title: Uludağ'daki otel yangını. 3 kişinin can verdiği otelde 450 gün sonra keşif

news.title: A Milli Futbol Takımı'na destek için meydanlar doldu taştı
news.summary: Türkiye'de vatandaşlar, A Milli Futbol Takımı'na destek vermek için meydanlara akın etti.

news.title: Türkiye ile Suriye arasında sağlık anlaşması
news.summary: Türkiye ile Suriye arasında sağlık ve tıbbi bilimler alanında işbirliği anlaşması imzalandı. Şam'da konuşan Sağlık Bakanı Kemal Memişoğlu, “Sağlıkta elimizden geldiğince Suriye hükümetine, insanlarına yardım edeceğiz.” ifadelerini kullandı.

news.title: Israel and Hezbollah agree ceasefire, US says, as more Lebanon strikes reported
news.summary: The agreement followed concerns that continued clashes would undermine the deal to end the war between the US and Iran.

news.title: Italy's Meloni says Trump 'made up' story that she 'begged' him for photo at G7
news.summary: The highly public exchange is an indication that their earlier close ties have frayed since Trump's decision to go to war with Iran.

news.title: US to stop funding HIV programmes in South Africa
news.summary: More than eight million South Africans are living with HIV – the highest number of any country in the world.

news.title: Watch: World Cup fans react to US defeating Australia to reach knockout round
news.summary: US supporters were delighted after their team won 2-0 against the Socceroos while Australian fans were left disappointed but still hopeful.

news.title: Zelensky stripped of highest Polish honour over WW2 name of army unit
news.summary: Ukraine has denounced the move, calling it a "strategic mistake" and "disrespectful".

news.title: African and Caribbean nations call for formal apology for transatlantic slavery
news.summary: The leaders have asked for apologies from the countries that benefited from the slave trade, as well as debt relief and financial compensation.

news.title: Mona Khalil, Lebanon’s turtle advocate, dies after Israeli attack
news.summary: Khalil spent more than two decades protecting the nests of endangered turtle species in southern Lebanon.

news.title: Australia pledges action on H5N1 after bird flu case confirmed
news.summary: Australia confirmed its first mainland H5N1 bird flu case in a seabird near Esperance, WA.

news.title: ‘We tasted the horrors of war’: Stories of refugees who returned home
news.summary: In 2025, nearly 15 million displaced people returned - the largest surge of returns recorded by the UN.

news.title: James Burrows, director of classic shows 'Cheers' and 'Friends,' dies at 85
news.summary: Burrows spent his career behind the camera specializing in situation comedies. Few viewers recognized him or knew his name, other than to see it flash quickly on the screen in the opening credits. But they knew his work.

news.title: Air Force One, gifted to Trump from Qatar, arrives at Joint Base Andrews
news.summary: The luxury Boeing 747, initially valued at $400 million, arrived ahead of schedule on Friday. The jet caused controversy as one of the biggest foreign gifts ever received by the U.S. government.

news.title: Italy's Meloni, once Trump's closest ally in Europe, says he made up a story about her
news.summary: "Italy and I do not beg," Meloni said in a video rebuke posted on social media Friday. Italy's top diplomat, meanwhile, said he was cancelling a visit to the U.S because of the alleged remarks.

news.title: Algae clouded Trump's vision for the Reflecting Pool. But scientists aren't surprised
news.summary: The shallow, sunny waters of the reflecting pool are an ideal incubator for algae growth in the summertime. Experts say the recent renovation may have helped accelerate it.

news.title: US-Iran talks in Switzerland canceled. And, DHS to give police facial recognition app
news.summary: The U.S.-Iran talks that were set to happen in Switzerland have been canceled. And, the Department of Homeland Security has plans to give some local police access to ICE facial recognition technology.

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
